should_keep: materials inventory paragraph naming MB, PLGA, SC6OH, surfactants, and solvents
should_drop: paragraph proxy of Table 1 when the repaired table summary exists
numeric table-footnote residue that repeats Table 1 variable structure
broad historical or mechanistic background context

selection_notes: The real table should outrank any paragraph proxy.
Two preparation blocks are valid because they describe genuinely distinct preparation branches.
Fallback context is optional and should usually be absent for this paper.
